content: While dentists are trained to provide dental care, they often prefer to have another dentist treat their own dental care problems to avoid potential biases and ensure objective care. Many dentists will visit a colleague or a trusted dental professional for their own dental needs, just like medical doctors often seek medical care from other physicians.
